# Copilot Instructions for this Repository

When project files are added, update this section with the exact commands used in this repo (including one-test invocation).

## High-level architecture

The repository is currently a scaffold with only a `.github/` directory and no application/infrastructure source files yet.

At this stage, there is no implemented runtime architecture, module layout, or component interaction flow to infer.

## Key conventions

No codebase-specific implementation conventions are established yet because there are no source files or project docs in the repository.

Treat this as a clean baseline and extend these instructions as soon as the first real modules, tooling, and workflows are introduced.
